{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-684", "name": "Incorrect Provision of Specified Functionality"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-pmfc-4wjj-gmhx. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
A logic error in the cut utility of uutils coreutils causes the utility to ignore the -s (only-delimited) flag when using the -z (null-terminated) and -d '' (empty delimiter) options together. The implementation incorrectly routes this specific combination through a specialized newline-delimiter code path that fails to check the record suppression status. Consequently, uutils cut emits the entire record plus a NUL byte instead of suppressing it. This divergence from GNU coreutils behavior creates a data integrity risk for automated pipelines that rely on cut -s to filter out undelimited data.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-532v-xp3f-837c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T18:05:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-532v-xp3f-837c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-532v-xp3f-837c"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:43Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:46Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35381", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/11394", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.8.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/483f13e91830c468262aa1e010e753d6ae99c898", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-532v-xp3f-837c"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has an Incorrect Provision of Specified Functionality Issue in its cut Utility", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T21:54:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-532v-xp3f-837c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.8.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T21:54:21Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has an Incorrect Provision of Specified Functionality Issue in its cut Utility
